name: tower
description: Control-tower pattern for orchestrating a standing fleet of TUI-agent (gjc) sessions from one supervisor session. A busy→idle watcher (bin/session_watch.py) streams completion events; the supervisor classifies each, enqueues human decisions in an idempotent operator queue (bin/queue_store.py + tower CLI), and relays direction into live sessions via tmux with built-in TUI-injection-trap defenses (bin/tower-notify.sh). The tower SKILL codifies the operational loop: boot re-registration, on-event classify/enqueue/report, no-report empty patrols, single notification channel. Distinct from gjc's team (work-worker coordination) — tower is a standing fleet + human decision queue.
